description.value: Aura strong (no school); CL 17th; Weight 5 lbs. Price varies by specific type: Lesser intensified metamagic rod 3,000 gp Intensified metamagic rod 11,000 gp Greater intensified metamagic rod 24,500 gp DESCRIPTION The wielder can cast up to three spells per day that are intensified as though using the Intensified Spell feat. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Rod, Intensified Spell Cost varies by specific type: Lesser intensified metamagic rod 1,500 gp Intensified metamagic rod 5,500 gp Greater intensified metamagic rod 12,250 gp
